entities.summary: Starting archetype for melee trainees on the Cristallo-aligned noble-house path. Shared Tessera draft premise; not the fixed protagonist identity.
entities.draftAdvancement: Knight or Warrior/Barbarian by faction reputation

entities.summary: Starting archetype for ranged fighters. Shared Tessera draft premise with Squire and Acolyte.
entities.draftAdvancement: Ranger or Marksman by faction reputation

entities.summary: Starting archetype for spellcaster initiates. Shared Tessera draft premise with Squire and Archer.
entities.draftAdvancement: Wizard or Sorcerer by faction reputation
